editorial_goal: Show directly observable evidence for the reviewer-selected subject.

targets.target_description: the foreground subject selected by the reviewer
positive_attributes: is directly visible in the source frame

observable_predicate: the selected subject reaches the requested directly visible state

predicate_phases.precondition: the requested state has not yet occurred
predicate_phases.apex: the requested state is directly visible
predicate_phases.postcondition: the visible result of the state change can be confirmed

required_evidence: the requested state is directly observable
negative_constraints: do not substitute a similar instance
do not infer content outside the supplied frame

aspect_constraints.constraint: keep the selected subject inside the visible frame
